[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110001 3
1 0100100 2
2 1000100 2
3 0010000 1
4 0110000 2
5 0100000 1
6 0000000 a
7 0000000 a

12 21 0110001 3 match 0

45 54 0010000 1 match 3
56 65 0110000 2 match 4
67 76 0100000 1 match 5
70 07 0100000 1 match 5
